title: India Company Incorporation — One Person Company (SPICe+ Part A & Part B, Form INC-32)
description: Reserve a company name and incorporate a One Person Company (OPC) in India through the integrated SPICe+ (Simplified Proforma for Incorporating Company Electronically Plus) web form on the MCA21 portal, administered by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) under the Companies Act, 2013 and the Companies (Incorporation) Rules, 2014. SPICe+ combines what were previously separate filings — name reservation (Part A), incorporation with allotment of Corporate Identification Number (CIN) and Director Identification Number (DIN) (Part B, Form INC-32), and PAN/TAN allotment — into a single form; it is the closest Indian analogue to a single-founder LLC formation, which is why this document is the GB counterpart-style scoped reference: a sole individual forming an OPC having equity share capital, who is the company's only subscriber to the Memorandum of Association and only director, is an Indian citizen resident in India, does not yet hold a Director Identification Number (the common case for a first-time founder — SPICe+ itself allots the DIN), and nominates one other Indian-citizen-resident individual under Section 3 of the Companies Act, 2013 as required for every OPC. Private (non-OPC) companies, Public companies, Producer companies, Section 8 (not-for-profit) companies, Nidhi companies, Part I LLP-to-company conversions, companies not having share capital, multiple share classes, non-individual/foreign subscribers, more than one company director, and the AGILE-PRO-S linked web form (GSTIN, EPFO, ESIC, PTEC/PTRC, Shops & Establishment registration, and bank account opening) are all out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md. Does not submit the application; the live MCA21 portal (mca.gov.in) is always authoritative.

authority.name: Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India (MCA21 portal), under the Companies Act, 2013

source.documentRef: SPICe+ Part A (Name Reservation) and SPICe+ Part B / Form INC-32 (Simplified Proforma for Incorporating Company Electronically Plus), pursuant to sections 4, 7, 8(1), 12, 152 and 153 of the Companies Act, 2013

verification.notes: mca.gov.in 403-blocks (Akamai edge/WAF) both direct curl/WebFetch and a headless-browser (Playwright) pass from this environment's egress — the same class of permanent IP-level block previously hit at nzta.govt.nz and i-kfz.de, not a JS challenge a browser can defeat. Sourced instead from: (1) the MCA's own downloadable 'Instruction Kit for webform SPICe+ Part A (Name Reservation)' and 'Instruction Kit for Form No. SPICe+ Part B' PDFs, both retrieved via a Wayback Machine snapshot of the official mca.gov.in path and text-extracted with pdfjs-dist; and (2) a very recent (2026-01-09) Wayback Machine snapshot of the live SPICe+ Part B Adaptive Form HTML itself (mca.gov.in/content/forms/af/mca-aem-forms/spice-part-b/spice-plus-part-b.html), whose rendered DOM text contains the complete section-by-section field label structure (Structure of the Company; Address of the Company; Subscriber and Directors details; OPC Nomination; Stamp Duty; PAN/TAN Information; Attachments; Declaration) used to source every field in this document. Status remains 'draft' pending a live walkthrough of the MCA21 portal wizard, which this environment cannot reach. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: proposedName1
fields.label: Proposed name of the company — first choice
fields.description: Proposed name for the One Person Company. Must include the suffix '(OPC) Private Limited' (e.g. 'ABC (OPC) Private Limited'). No abbreviation 'PVT'/'PVT.'/'(P)' is allowed, and 'LTD'/'LTD.'/'ltd'/'ltd.' is not allowed. Non-ASCII characters are not permitted.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part A Instruction Kit §3.1, Field 'Particulars of the proposed or approved name'; illustrative list item 'In case of one person company – ABC (OPC) Private Limited'

fields.name: proposedName2
fields.label: Proposed name of the company — second choice (optional)
fields.description: An optional second proposed name, used if the first choice is rejected on the resemblance/undesirability check. Same naming rules as proposedName1 apply.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part A Instruction Kit §3.1, Field 'Particulars of the proposed or approved name' — 'Two names can be proposed. However, it is mandatory to enter atleast one proposed name.'

fields.name: nicCode1
fields.label: Industry sub-class (NIC 2008 code) — primary
fields.description: Five-digit National Industrial Classification 2008 code identifying the company's primary industrial activity, selected via CRC's NIC search window. Up to three NIC codes may be selected in total; this one is the primary Industrial Classification the user is prompted to designate.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part A Instruction Kit §3.1, Field 'Search and select industry sub-class (NIC Codes)'

fields.name: nicCode2
fields.label: Industry sub-class (NIC 2008 code) — additional (optional)
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part A Instruction Kit §3.1 — 'maximum three five-digit NIC Codes'

fields.name: nicCode3
fields.label: Industry sub-class (NIC 2008 code) — additional (optional)
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part A Instruction Kit §3.1 — 'maximum three five-digit NIC Codes'

fields.name: aoaEntrenched
fields.label: Whether AOA is entrenched?
fields.description: Whether the Articles of Association contain entrenchment provisions (Section 5, Companies Act 2013) requiring a higher threshold than a special resolution to amend certain articles.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §1(a) 'Whether AOA is entrenched? Yes No'

fields.name: entrenchmentArticleCount
fields.label: Number of Articles to which provisions of entrenchment is applicable
fields.description: Must be greater than zero and less than or equal to 88 for a Private OPC.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §1(b); Instruction Kit Field No. 1 — 'shall be greater than zero and less than or equal to 88 (in case of Private OPC)'

fields.name: hasShareCapital
fields.label: Company is: having share capital
fields.description: This document models only the 'having share capital' branch (the common case for an OPC formed to carry on business with equity ownership). 'Not having share capital' (a company limited by guarantee) is out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §2 '*Company is: Having share capital / Not having share capital'

fields.name: equityShareClassDescription
fields.label: Equity share capital — class of shares
fields.description: Label for the single class of equity shares modelled by this document (e.g. 'Equity'). Scoped to one class; multiple share classes are out of scope.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §3A(i) 'Class of shares'

fields.name: authorizedEquityShares
fields.label: Number of authorized equity shares
fields.description: Value entered must be greater than zero. Total authorized share capital is computed by the system as authorizedEquityShares × nominalValuePerEquityShare and is not itself collected as a separate input.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §3A(i) 'Authorised capital'; Instruction Kit Field No. 3A(i) 'value entered shall be greater than zero in all the columns under header Authorised capital'

fields.name: subscribedEquityShares
fields.label: Number of subscribed equity shares
fields.description: Must be greater than zero and cannot exceed authorizedEquityShares. Equals the sole subscriber's shareholding for an OPC.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §3A(i) 'Subscribed capital'; Instruction Kit Field No. 3A(i) 'total number of subscribed shares/capital cannot exceed number of authorized shares/capital'

fields.name: nominalValuePerEquityShare
fields.label: Nominal amount per equity share (in INR)
fields.description: Must be the same value for both the authorized-capital and subscribed-capital columns.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §3A(i) 'Nominal amount per share (in INR)'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressLine1
fields.label: Correspondence address — Line 1
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'Line 1'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressLine2
fields.label: Correspondence address — Line 2
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'Line 2'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressPinCode
fields.label: Correspondence address — Pin code
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'Pin code'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressAreaLocality
fields.label: Correspondence address — Area/Locality
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'Area/Locality'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressCity
fields.label: Correspondence address — City
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'City'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressDistrict
fields.label: Correspondence address — District
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'District'

fields.name: correspondenceAddressState
fields.label: Correspondence address — State/UT
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'State/UT'

fields.name: companyPhoneNumber
fields.label: Company phone number (with STD code)
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'Phone No. (with STD Code)'

fields.name: companyMobileNumber
fields.label: Company mobile number
fields.description: Verified on the live portal by a one-time password sent to this number; the OTP itself is a runtime verification step, not applicant-supplied form data, so it is not modelled as a separate field.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A 'Contact details: Mobile No.'

fields.name: companyEmail
fields.label: Company email ID
fields.description: Verified on the live portal by a one-time password sent to this address; the OTP itself is a runtime verification step, not applicant-supplied form data, so it is not modelled as a separate field.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4A '*Email ID of the company'

fields.name: addressIsRegisteredOffice
fields.label: Whether the address for correspondence is the address of registered office of the company
fields.description: This document models only the common 'Yes' case (the correspondence address given above doubles as the registered office from day one). 'No' (a distinct registered office collected separately) is out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4B '*Whether the address for correspondence is the address of registered office of the company'

fields.name: registeredOfficeLongitude
fields.label: Registered office — longitude
fields.description: Must correspond to the pin code given in the correspondence/registered address.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4B 'Longitude'

fields.name: registeredOfficeLatitude
fields.label: Registered office — latitude
fields.description: Must correspond to the pin code given in the correspondence/registered address.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4B 'Latitude'

fields.name: registrarOfCompaniesOffice
fields.label: Name of the office of the Registrar of Companies in which the proposed company is to be registered
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §4C '*Name of the office of the Registrar of Companies in which the proposed company is to be registered'

fields.name: founderCitizenOfIndia
fields.label: Sole subscriber-cum-director — whether citizen of India
fields.description: Must be true: OPC eligibility (Companies (Incorporation) Rules, 2014, Rule 3) is restricted to a natural person who is an Indian citizen.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §7B(i) '*Whether citizen of India Yes No'

fields.name: founderResidentInIndia
fields.label: Sole subscriber-cum-director — whether resident in India
fields.description: Must be true: OPC eligibility (Rule 3) is restricted to a natural person resident in India (stayed in India for a period of not less than 120 days during the immediately preceding financial year).
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §7B(i) '*Whether resident in India Yes No'

fields.name: nomineeConsentAndDeclaration
fields.label: Nominee — consent and declaration
fields.description: Combines the nominee's consent to become a member of the company on the subscriber's death/incapacity with their declaration of Indian citizenship/residency, absence of prior conviction or disqualification under company/LLP law in the last five years, that they are not already a nominee in any other OPC, and that they will comply with Rule 3(3)'s eligibility criteria within the prescribed period. Modelled as one combined field per this registry's convention for a single-signature declaration block (cf. in/eci/voter-registration's declarationAndConsent).
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §8B 'Consent along with declaration by Nominee'

fields.name: nomineeDigitallySigned
fields.label: Nominee — to be digitally signed by nominee
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §8B 'To be digitally signed by Nominee'

fields.label: Source of Income

fields.name: businessProfessionCode
fields.label: Business/Profession code
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §10 '*Business/Profession code'

fields.name: nameAndRegistrationDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration — name reservation and registration compliance
fields.description: Combines the director's declaration that the proposed name was checked against the MCA/LLP register and registered trademarks and complies with the Emblems and Names (Prevention of Improper Use) Act, 1950 and is not offensive; that all Companies Act 2013 requirements relating to DIN allotment and company registration have been complied with; that the company will not commence business until required sectoral-regulator approvals (RBI, SEBI, etc.) are obtained; and that the registered office is capable of receiving communications at the address given at §4A. Modelled as one combined field per this registry's convention for a single-signature declaration block.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §12, declaration paragraphs

fields.name: directorDisqualificationDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration — director not restrained, disqualified, or a proclaimed offender
fields.description: Declares the proposed director(s) are not restrained/disqualified/removed under Companies Act 2013 ss.164/169, not a proclaimed offender, and not already allotted a DIN under s.154.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §12, declaration paragraph re: sections 164, 169, 154, 447, 448

fields.name: borderingCountryNationalSecurityClearance
fields.label: Whether the person seeking appointment is a national of a country sharing a land border with India and has attached MHA security clearance
fields.description: If true, security clearance from the Ministry of Home Affairs must be attached (see the borderingCountrySecurityClearanceDocument entry in documents[]). founderNationality is restricted to 'india' in this document, so this declares 'No' for the sole scoped scenario; retained as a field because it is a printed, always-asked declaration on the form regardless of the subscriber's own nationality.
fields.sourceRef: SPICe+ Part B webform §12 'person seeking appointment is a national of a country which shares a land border with India, necessary security clearance from Ministry of Home Affairs...shall be attached with the consent. Yes No'
